scenes.title: The Annoyed Neighbor
scenes.summary: Squidward sits grumbling about SpongeBob's constant singing next door. He groans dramatically as SpongeBob's cheerful voice drifts through.

shots.prompt: Vertical 9:16 underwater scene in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob the yellow square sponge with big expressive eyes and a cheerful smile skips toward Squidward's Easter Island head house while humming a cheerful tune, purple coral and bubbles in background, cartoon animation style, bright underwater colors.

scenes.title: The Chase
scenes.summary: A strong current rips Squidward's beloved clarinet away! SpongeBob springs into action, chasing it down the street with boundless enthusiasm.

shots.prompt: Vertical 9:16 medium shot, SpongeBob the yellow sponge chasing a flying purple clarinet underwater, determined expression, bubbles streaking behind him for motion blur effect, coral reef rushing by, comedic chase scene, cartoon style.

scenes.title: The Beginning of Friendship
scenes.summary: SpongeBob returns, battered but triumphant, holding the rescued clarinet. Squidward hesitates, then offers his lawn chair to SpongeBob. They sit together - the beginning of a beautiful friendship.

shots.prompt: Vertical 9:16 two-shot from behind, SpongeBob and Squidward sitting together on rocks outside Squidward's house, SpongeBob holding the rescued clarinet with a big smile, Squidward sporting a subtle genuine smile, blue underwater sky with floating jellyfish, heartwarming sunset lighting, cartoon animation style.
